nodes.label: AI as efficient screening tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable hallucinator requiring verification
nodes.grounding_span: The AI screen allows me to reduce the amount of steps to get to the final answer

nodes.label: AI trustworthiness and verification
nodes.grounding_span: At the moment there are too many hallucinations to have any great degree of trust

nodes.label: AI as verification-requiring tool
nodes.grounding_span: I would love to be able to trust AI to do the things I ask it to do correctly, and not have to double check everything

nodes.label: AI for sequence analysis tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I have used AI to help decide on restriction enzymes, primer design and verification of plasmid design

nodes.label: Research efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: The AI screen allows me to reduce the amount of steps to get to the final answer

nodes.label: Scientific rigor and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I still use old fashioned sequence analysis software, restriction enzyme supplier catalogs etc, to verify the AI outputs

nodes.label: Pragmatic acceptance of AI as a tool

nodes.label: Domain-expertise-driven verification of AI outputs
nodes.grounding_span: I use processes I have always used for 20 years

nodes.label: Systematic iterative verification — works independently first, then checks with AI
